task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Nightly Cleanup Batch Job** (Level 7)

ARCHETYPE: batch_job. Shape: backend-only (no pages, no auth), driven by a CRON schedule block (every day at 2am), NO external API calls, NO transforms — just pure cleanup. DO NOT call any external URL (that would make this a data_sync or etl). DO NOT build a dashboard. DO NOT build multiple endpoints — only POST /api/logs (for test setup) and GET /api/logs (for verification). The CORE of this task is the scheduled job: `every da
final_source:
build for javascript backend
database is local memory

create a Logs table:
  message, required
  level, default 'info'
  created_at_date, auto

# Scheduled job: runs every day at 2am to delete logs older than 30 days
every day at 2am:
  old_logs = look up all Logs where created_at_date is older than 30 days
  delete old_logs from Logs

# Endpoint to retrieve all logs (for verification)
when user calls GET /api/logs:
  logs = get all Logs
  send back logs

# Endpoint to create a log entry (for test setup)
when user calls POST /api/logs sending entry:
  saved = save entry to Logs
  send back saved with status 201
